Steve Sekely and William King Baggot were both known by multiple names or nicknames. 

- **Steve Sekely** was known by several names due to his changing professional and immigration status. He was born as Székely István and later adopted the name Stefan Szekely. He was also known as "Steve Sekely" throughout his career.

- **William King Baggot** was referred to as "King of the Movies," "The Most Photographed Man in the World," and "The Man Whose Face Is As Familiar As The Man In The Moon." These were nicknames or titles used to describe his fame and popularity in the silent film era.

Thus, both individuals were known by multiple names or nicknames.
